About Us

The main goal of our Business Administration Department is to train competent managers and entrepreneurs who are equipped to meet the needs of a rapidly changing and globalizing economy and who can assume a leadership role in the business world.

Our department offers an education that integrates theoretical knowledge and practice through practice-oriented projects and assignments. Company executives are often invited to our department courses as guest speakers and share their first-hand experiences in the sector with the students.

The medium of instruction is English.

OUR GRADUATES

They enter business life as individuals who have the ability to analyze and predict, develop strategies, and take an active role in fulfilling managerial responsibilities.

They can pursue their careers in a wide range of fields from banking to auditing, from human resources to sales, from management consulting to marketing.
